passiveAbilities.name: Strength from Beyond
passiveAbilities.description: If at least one friendly model was slain this turn, this character gains +2 Arcane Stat until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Summon the Forgotten King
arcaneAbilities.description:
Place a new Echo of the Forgotten King in base contact; it is considered a permanent additional character in your troupe and may activate this turn. Then this model is slain.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 3 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Reanimate
arcaneAbilities.description:
Place a friendly slain model in base contact with this model. Restore half its health rounding up. It has no energy but may activate this turn. 
Catastrophe: This model suffers 4 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Eternal Servitude
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target Elrich or Noble restores X Wds or gains +1 energy.
Target Human or Noble gains +1 energy.
Target Risen or Noble restores X Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Save me, my Liege!
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move this model 4" directly towards the nearest friendly Noble.
